description: HubSpot CMS serverless functions — Node.js functions running on HubSpot's infrastructure
note: Serverless functions are supported in developer platform version 2025.1. Not supported in version 2025.2.
overview: Serverless functions let you run Node.js code server-side without managing infrastructure. Used for API calls, form processing, data fetching, and dynamic content.

directory_structure.project_layout:
project-folder/
├── hsproject.json
└── src/app/
    ├── app.json
    └── app.functions/
        ├── function.js
        ├── package.json
        └── serverless.json

serverless_json.description: Configuration file defining endpoints and function settings

function_signature.description: Every serverless function exports a main function

context_object.description: The context parameter contains request information

properties.description: URL query string parameters as object
Contact data if visitor is identified

secrets_usage.security_warning: Never return secret values in responses or console.log — they would be exposed to the client

calling_from_frontend.description: Call serverless functions from browser JavaScript

debugging.in_app: HubSpot App > CRM Development > Private apps > Logs tab

authentication_methods.description: Store token as a secret, access via process.env. For project-based: can reference directly.
Securely stored credentials added via CLI
